modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Can't copy text from PDF in Acrobat

full_description_text:  
I can't copy text from a .pdf file.  
I try to select it but nothing happens.  
This is really frustrating and I need help.
short_description: Can't copy text from PDF in Acrobat
description:
I can't copy text from a .pdf file.  
I try to select it but nothing happens.  
This is really frustrating and I need help.
